task.en: Two-step task: (1) In Calendar, create a new event titled exactly `Standup` on 2026-06-01 from 10:00 AM to 10:30 AM in any calendar. (2) Then switch to Mail and create a new draft message (do NOT send) with the subject `Standup`. Close the draft so it is saved to Drafts.

pre_command: UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.mail',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 3; DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; open -gj -a Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; for trg in $(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='trigger' AND tbl_name='CalendarItem';" 2>/dev/null); do sqlite3 "$DB" "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS \"$trg\";" 2>/dev/null; done; sqlite3 "$DB" "DELETE FROM CalendarItem WHERE summary='Standup';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$DB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Mail 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; EI="$HOME/Library/Mail/V10/MailData/Envelope Index"; sqlite3 "$EI" "DELETE FROM messages WHERE subject IN (SELECT ROWID FROM subjects WHERE subject LIKE '%Standup%');" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$EI" "DELETE FROM subjects WHERE subject LIKE '%Standup%';" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$EI" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; find "$HOME/Library/Mail" -path '*Drafts.mbox*' -name '*.emlx' -delete 2>/dev/null; open -gj -a Mail 2>/dev/null; sleep 8; sleep 1
grading_command: DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; killall Calendar 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; D=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT date(start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem WHERE entity_type=0 AND summary='Standup' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$D" = "2026-06-01" ] && echo True || echo False

DB="$HOME/Library/Calendars/Calendar.sqlitedb"; T=$(sqlite3 "$DB" "SELECT strftime('%H:%M',start_date+978307200,'unixepoch','localtime') FROM CalendarItem WHERE entity_type=0 AND summary='Standup' ORDER BY start_date DESC LIMIT 1;" 2>/dev/null); [ "$T" = "10:00" ] && echo True || echo False
MAIL=$(osascript -e 'tell application "Mail" to get subject of every message of (first mailbox whose name contains "Draft")' 2>/dev/null); echo "$MAIL" | grep -q "Standup" && echo True || echo False
